column1: # scripts/pm/arc_taxonomy.tsv - arc taxonomy (v2, 2026-07-06, Issue #973 model A')
# Source of truth for the arc ROSTER + each arc's slate PHASE only.
# MEMBERSHIP (issue -> arc) is LABEL-authoritative (the arc:<slug> label set at
# triage), NOT listed here - member lists drifted by construction (Issue #973).
# apply_arc_labels.sh discovers members live via `gh issue list --label arc:<slug>`
# and DERIVES each member's arc-phase:<phase> label from the phase below.
# Guideline (ADVISORY, not a gate): ~3 arcs `active` (the focus slate). Exceeding it
# prints a NOTE, never DRIFT -- `active` was measured not to predict throughput
# (Issue #1102), and WIP limits belong on work in flight, not on categories.
arc:junction-filtering     later   Junction filtering + classification (annotated / normal-shared / tumor-exclusive)
arc:variant-cohort         later   Variant calling + patient-cohort processing
arc:scoring-tcr-pmhc       active  MHC presentation + TCR-pMHC structural scoring
arc:results-reporting      later   Results assembly + report.html + reproducibility of outputs
arc:cloud-reproducibility  next    Cloud/GPU infra, cost posture, environment reproducibility
arc:memory-methodology     later   Memory curation + multi-role methodology + governance research
arc:board-governance       active  Board/Kanban governance, hooks, closure ritual, PM tooling
arc:immunogenicity-benchmark active  Splice-immunogenicity ground-truth registry + caller/scorer benchmark
